overview: Create a runtime XR scene containing a workbench with tools and safety gloves, implementing functionality for the user to pick up the gloves and 'wear' them by bringing them close to their head (HMD).

implementation_steps.title: Load Scene Assets
implementation_steps.what: Load the 'Table', 'Tool', 'Screwdriver', and 'SafetyGloves' 3D model resources using `Resources.Load<GameObject>()`.
implementation_steps.why: To prepare the 3D assets required for the training scenario before instantiation.

implementation_steps.title: Instantiate Workbench
implementation_steps.what: Instantiate the 'Table' prefab at world position (0, 0, 1) and ensure it has a `BoxCollider` component attached.
implementation_steps.why: To provide a physical surface for the interactable objects to rest on.

implementation_steps.title: Instantiate Distractor Tools
implementation_steps.what: Instantiate the 'Tool' and 'Screwdriver' prefabs at positions (0.2, 0.8, 1) and (-0.2, 0.8, 1) respectively. Add `Rigidbody` and `BoxCollider` components to both instances.
implementation_steps.why: To populate the scene with the required context objects (distractors) that obey physics.

implementation_steps.title: Instantiate Safety Gloves
implementation_steps.what: Instantiate the 'SafetyGloves' prefab at position (0, 0.8, 1). Add a `Rigidbody` and `BoxCollider` component to the instance.
implementation_steps.why: To spawn the target interaction object in the scene with basic physics properties.

implementation_steps.title: Enable Glove Grabbing
implementation_steps.what: Add the `UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.XRGrabInteractable` component to the 'SafetyGloves' GameObject.
implementation_steps.why: To allow the user to pick up and manipulate the gloves using the XR Interaction Toolkit.

implementation_steps.title: Create Glove Equip Logic Component
implementation_steps.what: Create a runtime class `GloveEquipController` inheriting from `MonoBehaviour` and add it as a component to the 'SafetyGloves' GameObject.
implementation_steps.why: To host the custom logic required to detect when the gloves should be 'worn'.

implementation_steps.title: Implement Selection Monitoring
implementation_steps.what: In `GloveEquipController`, cache a reference to the `XRGrabInteractable` component and checking `isSelected` within the `Update` loop.
implementation_steps.why: To ensure the 'wear' logic only triggers if the user is currently holding the gloves.

implementation_steps.title: Implement Head Proximity Check
implementation_steps.what: In the `GloveEquipController` `Update` loop, calculate `Vector3.Distance` between the glove's `transform.position` and `Camera.main.transform.position`.
implementation_steps.why: To detect if the user has brought the gloves close to their face/body to simulate putting them on.

implementation_steps.title: Execute Wear Action
implementation_steps.what: In `GloveEquipController`, if `isSelected` is true AND distance < 0.3f, disable the 'SafetyGloves' GameObject and log 'Gloves Equipped' to the console.
implementation_steps.why: To finalize the interaction, simulating the gloves being worn by removing the physical prop from the scene.
